Hey, thanks for coming over to the TextWorld today, there is something I need you to do for me. First of all, you could, like, travel east. And then, go south. Then, take a trip south. That done, head east. Then, pick-up the coin from the floor of the launderette. And if you do that, you're the winner!

-= Shower =-
You arrive in a shower. A standard one. The room seems oddly familiar, as though it were only superficially different from the other rooms in the building.



You don't like doors? Why not try going east, that entranceway is unguarded.

It's time to explore the amazing world of TextWorld! Here is how to play! First of all, go to the south. After that, make an attempt to head west. If you can get around to doing that, venture west. Once you accomplish that, make an attempt to go south. Okay, and then, pick up the coin from the floor of the office. Once that's all handled, you can stop!
